metadata.description: Chewiesoft's plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Cursor — skills and commands for development workflows

plugins.name: cicd
plugins.description: Unified CI/CD troubleshooting and pipeline configuration for GitHub Actions, Docker, GHCR, and self-hosted runners

plugins.name: deploy
plugins.description: Automated deployment commands — staging and production pipelines via CD

plugins.name: codereview
plugins.description: Code review toolkit: automated pre-PR review with severity grading and model routing for token efficiency (haiku/sonnet/opus), TOCTOU race condition detection, accessibility checks, data integrity analysis, hardcoded secrets detection (passwords, JWT, AWS/GCP/GitHub tokens, PEM keys — GitGuardian-equivalent, applied to CODE/TESTS/CONFIG with BLOCKED banner + forced grade F), and multi-reviewer PR comment resolver (CodeRabbit, Copilot, Gemini, Codex) with severity recalibration, cross-reviewer deduplication, and GitHub conversation resolution. Stack-agnostic with TypeScript/React defaults and dotnet preset for C#/.NET projects.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Interactive setup for Claude Code status line — customize model info (with optional effortLevel badge), context bar, git branch, cost tracking, and more. Cross-platform: Bash + PowerShell.

plugins.name: release
plugins.description: Automated GitHub Release creation with categorized release notes from git history. Multi-stack (C#/.NET, Node.js, Go, Rust, Python) with --path filter for monorepo component releases. Contributor resolution via org membership cross-reference.

plugins.name: dotnet-wpf
plugins.description: Complete C#/.NET WPF development toolkit — project setup & audit, Fluent Design guide (90+ controls, DataGrid icon patterns, RowHeight sizing, form spacing recipes, UserControl height clipping diagnosis, date control MaxYear validation trap, multi-column form layouts, Grid row separators, ContentDialog confirmation pattern for destructive actions), WinForms-to-WPF MVVM migration, and FlaUI E2E testing.

plugins.name: ddd
plugins.description: Domain-Driven Design toolkit: analisa codebases e aponta violações DDD, guia strategic design (event storming, context mapping), gera specs de conversão legacy→DDD e ensina conceitos sob demanda. Agnóstica de linguagem, progressive disclosure por tema, síntese de Evans + Vernon + práticas contemporâneas.

plugins.name: retrofit-skill
plugins.description: Captures non-obvious session lessons and applies them to a target skill in this marketplace — bumps version, updates CHANGELOG, marketplace.json and README, commits and pushes.
